task.title: Installing the Application
task.shortdesc: How to install the application on a supported platform.

prereq.p: You must have administrator privileges and at least 2 GB of free disk space.

context.p: The installer will create a new service and configure the firewall automatically.

step.cmd: Download the installer package from the releases page.
Run the installer with administrator privileges.
step.info: On Windows, right-click the installer and choose Run as administrator.

step.cmd: Accept the license agreement and follow the setup wizard.
Click Finish when the installation completes.

result.p: The application is installed and the service starts automatically.
